lidInterlockRequirement.label:
«requirement»
REQ-B-001 Lid Interlock
Prevent blending unless lid
and container are seated.

motorControlRequirement.label:
«requirement»
REQ-B-002 Motor Control
Command motor speed and stop
under program control.

smoothnessDetectionRequirement.label:
«requirement»
REQ-B-003 Smoothness Detection
Use sensor feedback to stop
when smoothness threshold is met.

powerRequirement.label:
«requirement»
REQ-B-004 Power
Provide controlled electrical
power to the motor base.

interlockLatencyRequirement.label:
«requirement»
REQ-B-010 Interlock Latency
Disable motor within 100 ms
of lid-open detection.

motorSpeedRequirement.label:
«requirement»
REQ-B-020 Motor Speed
Achieve 20,000 rpm no-load
and controlled ramp-up.

overcurrentProtectionRequirement.label:
«requirement»
REQ-B-021 Overcurrent
Stop motor within 250 ms
of jam or overcurrent.

smoothnessThresholdRequirement.label:
«requirement»
REQ-B-030 Smoothness Threshold
Declare smooth when vibration
index remains below threshold.

noiseRequirement.label:
«requirement»
REQ-B-040 Noise
Operate below 85 dBA at
1 m during normal blending.

containerSeatRequirement.label:
«requirement»
REQ-B-050 Container Seat
Detect seated container before
motor torque is enabled.
